rationale.R1.1: Identifies the core conceptual issue, shows drift, and proposes a solid reframing.
rationale.R1.2: Walks through argument chain, flags key inconsistencies, proposes fixes but not exhaustive.
rationale.R1.6: Polished writing with consistent register and no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: Flags some uncertainties but doesn't mark confidence for each recommendation.
